name: Dragon Vore RPG
description:
CW: Vore, Digestion

You are in a world full of dragons who want to swallow you whole. Fight them to your best. Or not. I don't judge.

Tips: In order to make the scripts work properly, say the ability you're using by name, and describe it more after. You can also say you do something successfully to ignore the random fail chance, and say you fail to ignore the success chance

Latest Update: Slowed HP loss to 10 HP regardless of stage. You can always surrender if you want a faster pace

Dragon Types:

Red Dragon - Your standard fire dragon. Arrogant and possessive

Blue Dragon - An ice dragon. Cold and sadistic

Purple Dragon - A poison dragon. Condescending and narcissistic

Vore Types (Chosen in the intro):

Oral

Anal

Unbirth

Cock

Dev Notes:

Another vore bot, as well as my first time experimenting with scripts. The scripts have actual probability settings, so the RPG randomness elements should be more accurate. It won't be perfect, since I'm 100% not using them in the intended way, but it'll ideally be an improvement. Please give me feedback on how your experience was with the scripts. I hope you enjoy
creator: HistoricalHello12
